Lieutenant '''D. Wolren''' was an officer working for [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] Security in the months leading up to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

Wolren sent a warning [[e-mail]] message about another message titled "Need your help!" which contained an [[Dark Virus|Imperial virus]] which would delete everything in the inbox. However [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] opened the message and was not harmed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
